UNWIND [true, false, null] AS b
UNWIND [true, false, null] AS c
WITH a, b, c WHERE a IS NULL OR b IS NULL OR c IS NULL
RETURN a, b, c, (a AND (b AND c)) IS NULL = ((a AND b) AND c) IS NULL AS result
